title: 30 Pcs Foldable Love Heart Greeting Cards, Assorted Color Romantic Heart Blank Cards Note Card, Sweet Thank You Cards Gift Cards for Valentine's Day Mother's Day Anniversary Wedding Party
features: 【Premium Material】: These small note cards are made of quality cardboard, thick and durable, not easy to tear. The card inner pages are blank and writable, suitable for any time you want to express gratitude.

【Small Size】: The size of each folded gift card is about 9.8 × 6.8 cm / 3.9 × 2.7 inch. The size of each unfolded gift card is about 13.6 x 9.8 cm / 5.4 × 3.9 inch. Proper size can send the most sincere thanks to your family and friends.
【Unique Heart-Shape】: Each blank card has a separate heart-shaped cut. Romantic and sweet design make these cards more attractive, and you can send the heart card to express your love and wishes.

【Morandi Colors】: Best wishes heart cards are available in 6 colors, 5 for each color, 30 in total. Soft colors can add a festive atmosphere to you, ideal for send out on Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Christmas, wedding, birthday, etc.

【Wide Application】: Available for a variety of occasions to write your greetings, blessings, love and little secrets, etc. They not only can be applied for leaving messages for family, but also can be served as party invitations, shower notes, wedding greeting cards, scrapbooking design, DIY card making and more.
description: Specification - Material: Cardboard - Color: 6 Different Color - Unfolded Size: about 13.6 x 9.8 cm / 5.4 × 3.9 inch - Folded Size: about 9.8 × 6.8 cm / 3.9 × 2.7 inch - Quantity: 18 pcs Greeting Cards Features - The card inner pages are blank and writable, suitable for any time you want to express gratitude. - Available for a variety of occasions to write your greetings, blessings, love and little secrets, etc. - Romantic and sweet design make these cards more attractive, and you can send the heart card to express your love and wishes. - Soft colors can add a festive atmosphere to you, ideal for send out on Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Christmas, wedding, birthday, etc. - Can be applied for leaving messages for family. - Can be served as party invitations, shower notes, wedding greeting cards, scrapbooking design, DIY card making and more.
